spec.length_desc: 10-15 turns total, includes history-taking and exam

transcript:
HCP: patient is Sarah Jenkins, 45 years old
HCP: she presents with intermittent sharp abdominal pain in the right lower quadrant
HCP: pain started 3 days ago and worsens after eating
HCP: associated with nausea but no vomiting
HCP: she has a history of irritable bowel syndrome
HCP: currently taking omeprazole 20mg daily and simvastatin 40mg daily
HCP: no known drug allergies
HCP: physical exam shows tenderness at McBurney's point
HCP: bowel sounds are normal
HCP: please refer for surgical assessment to rule out appendicitis or other acute abdominal pathology
